creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 240598
ipcalc-0.51.patch

Description:

* Update to 0.51
* Change MAINTAINER
* pet portclippy/portfmt
* Add LICENSE_FILE
* Use USE_GITHUB: the code has been moved to it.

ChangeLog: https://github.com/kjokjo/ipcalc/blob/0.51/changelog

* (fix) Typo in help content.
* fix split_network: split_network results were wrong since introduction of bignum. log function replaced with loop.

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1-RELEASE, amd64)
